known_issues: SwarmDetailView plus buttons do not pass the current swarm's ID when creating a law token, causing 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error. Parent swarm ID should be automatically injected from the displayed swarm, no user confirmation needed. UI should stay on swarm detail view after creation.

existing_features.title: In SwarmDetailView, when the Yes or No plus button is clicked to open the CreateLawTokenDialog, automatically pass the currently displayed swarm's ID as the parent swarm ID into the dialog's creation call. The swarm ID must be read directly from the swarm detail view's own state/props — no user input or confirmation required. The dialog must call the backend's law token creation function with this swarm ID correctly populated so that the 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error no longer occurs.

projectName: Fix SwarmDetailView to auto-inject current swarm ID when creating law tokens
